# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
    "parameters": {
        "keyVaultName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
            }
        },
        "location": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Location for the Azure Key Vault."
            }
        },
        "secretReadersObjectIds": {
            "type": "array",
            "defaultValue": [],
            "metadata": {
                "description": "Array of Object IDs (GUIDs) for service principals or managed identities that need 'get' and 'list' secret permissions."
            }
        }
    },
    "variables": {
        "vaults_apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
        "accessPoliciesArray": "[map(parameters('secretReadersObjectIds'), (objectId) => createObject('objectId', objectId, 'tenantId', subscription().tenantId, 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list'))))]"
    },
    "resources": [
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('vaults_apiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "properties": {
                "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
                "sku": {
                    "family": "A",
                    "name": "standard"
                },
                "accessPolicies": "[variables('accessPoliciesArray')]",
                "enabledForDeployment": false,
                "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
                "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
                "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
                "enableSoftDelete": true,
                "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
                "networkAcls": {
                    "defaultAction": "Allow",
                    "bypass": "AzureServices",
                    "ipRules": [],
                    "virtualNetworkRules": []
                }
            }
        }
    ],
    "outputs": {
        "keyVaultUri": {
            "type": "string",
            "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('vaults_apiVersion')).vaultUri]"
        }
    }
}
